LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT DOBY DOBIECKI'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGEMENT. DEFENDANT DOBY DOBIECKI'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. COUNSEL FOR THE DEFENDANT IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: M. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgement; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar May-29-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT DOBY DOBIECKI's Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgement.

Defendant Doby Dobiecki's motion to set aside default and default judgment is granted. No opposition filed.

Counsel for the defendant is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
